reason_detail: To increase diversity, mutation probability is raised (from 0.13 to 0.21) and crossover probability slightly reduced (from 0.9 to 0.82) to encourage more exploration. Distribution indices eta_c and eta_m are decreased (to 15.0 and 30.0) to produce more disruptive offspring, enhancing spread. Local search probability is halved (to 0.05) to reduce exploitation pressure, while repair remains at 1.0 to preserve feasibility. All changes respect max_step=0.08 and parameter bounds.

To increase convergence pressure: slightly reduced mutation_prob to limit disruptive variation, increased crossover_prob to promote recombination of high-quality solutions, raised eta_c and eta_m to sharpen distribution parameters (encouraging offspring closer to parents), kept repair_prob at maximum to maintain feasibility, and moderately increased local_search_prob to refine elite solutions—all changes within max_step=0.08 bounds.
